meta.title: Unabetsu Ski Area (Kaibetsu) — LP Mock
meta.description: Landing page mock for Unabetsu Ski Area—Shiretoko gateway with immersive drift-ice skiing. Based on the web renewal strategy.

banner.text: Immersive drift-ice · real-time dashboard strategy | AI-generated mock images

hero.title:
Unabetsu
Ski Area
hero.tagline: A rare worldwide run that feels like diving into drift ice

quality.title:
Not just
the views.
quality.lead: From ultra-low elevation (~50 m), Okhotsk drift ice fills your sightline. At the same time, Salmon Course up to 31° with careful grooming—a serious carving hill.
quality.imgAlt: Carving turn on a larch run—with drift ice in the background

primary.title: Immersion in drift ice
primary.lead: Dynamics you can't get at high-altitude resorts—drift ice at eye level. A two-hour scenic activity on a Shiretoko–Abashiri side trip.
primary.imgAlt: Spectacular skiing with Okhotsk drift ice below

secondary.title: Hands-free 2-hour plan
secondary.lead: Book gear and wear online. Enter height and boot size, prepay with a 2-hour ticket—zero anxiety about "maybe they won't have my size."

rental.title:
Travel light,
ski the view.
rental.lead: For light tourists and inbound visitors stopping during Shiretoko sightseeing. Book ski/snowboard sets and outerwear online. Combine with 4-hour (¥2,200) or day (¥3,200) tickets.
rental.whisper: Reduce lodge check-in load and maximize high-margin rental revenue—the core revenue-doubling lever.
rental.imgAlt: Rental gear at the lodge—for hands-free visitors

tour.title:
Shiretoko & Shari
in half a day.
tour.lead: Beyond a single-facility guide. Model courses combining the "Road to Heaven" drive, local onsen, and two hours at Unabetsu—becoming a tourism hub that extends town-wide stay and spend.

01.title: Arrival
01.body: Shari / Shiretoko area. Check today's conditions on the dashboard

02.title: Scenic runs
02.body: Hands-free rental + 2-hour ticket. Ski the drift-ice view

03.title: Explore
03.body: Road to Heaven, warm up at onsen

04.title: Share
04.body: UGC with drift ice backdrop—for the next visitor

drift.title: Drift-ice dive experience
drift.body: From ~50 m elevation, Okhotsk drift ice fills your view. Unlike Abashiro Lake View's distant panorama, Unabetsu offers overwhelming proximity and immersion—experiential tourism only at Shiretoko's gateway.

rentalGuide.title: Complete hands-free rental guide
rentalGuide.body: Size entry → ticket selection → card payment. Full web flow including ski, snowboard, and wear inventory. English for inbound visitors, mobile-optimized.

shiretoko.title: Shiretoko & Shari half-day model course
shiretoko.body: Stopover plans paired with icebreaker cruises and drift-ice walks. Road to Heaven, onsen, lodge lunch—a tour package aligned with Shari's second tourism promotion plan.
